'''Winkie''' was the name of one of [[Tia Organa]]'s pet [[pittin]]s. Winkie died in the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
